last_scan.last_telegram_summary: KINETIC ESCALATION: IRGC attacked 21+ merchant vessels in Hormuz. Sea mines reported. WTI $104.32 (hit $105.62). Market opens 9:15 IST today — gap-down near-certain. CPI tonight likely 3.6-3.8%. 23,500+23,000 PE still live.

calendar.event: India March CPI inflation data release
calendar.expected: Consensus ~3.4% (up from 3.21% Feb). WTI $100+ makes hot print more likely. Instant market reaction — opens same day.
Full-day closure. Blockade + WTI $100 news flows unabsorbed. Wednesday gap risk extreme.

calendar.event: Weekly F&O expiry + Reliance Industries Q4 FY26 results
calendar.expected: Double catalyst: F&O expiry (compressed week) + Reliance board approves Q4 results. Jio and Retail growth key. Max volatility day.
Muted 0.5-1.5% QoQ revenue growth. Low bar. FY27 guidance tone-setting for IT sector.
NIM recovery >3.65% is critical trigger. Deposits +14.4% YoY. Weekend results — reacts Monday Apr 20.
Strong lending growth expected. Credit cost normalization key. Weekend results — reacts Monday Apr 20.
IT sector bellwether post TCS/Wipro. FY27 guidance key for sustained IT recovery.
Turnaround story — margin recovery trajectory key.

calendar.event: Infosys Q4 FY26 results + FY27 guidance
calendar.expected: FY27 guidance range 2-6% across brokerages — binary outcome. Biggest IT event of Q4.
Double event: monthly F&O rollover + Fed decision (6 PM GMT). Fed expected to hold. Any surprise = VIX spike. Max OI week.
Potential 25 bps cut from 5.25% if CPI benign and crude stabilises. June cut probability collapses if Hormuz stays closed.

tracker.title: US-Iran Ceasefire & Strait of Hormuz
tracker.india_impact: CRITICAL: IRGC attacked 21+ merchant vessels overnight (Apr 12-13). Sea mines planted in strait. Hormuz now functionally closed — not just blockaded. WTI $104.32 (intraday $105.62). Market opens 9:15 IST today into this. OMC maximum pain. CPI tonight likely 3.6-3.8% (above consensus). Wednesday gap (holiday Apr 14) into F&O expiry (Apr 15) = extreme structural risk.
tracker.watch_for: Today Nifty open — gap-down magnitude. WTI $110 next level. IRGC further attacks. US military response. CPI print ~17:30 IST.

tracker.title: Q4 FY26 Earnings Season
tracker.india_impact: TCS beat 29% but fell 2% — sell-the-news confirmed. Reliance Apr 15, Wipro Apr 16, HCL Tech Apr 21, TechM Apr 22, Infosys Apr 23. HDFC Bank/ICICI Bank Apr 18 (react Apr 20) are critical banking events. Earnings need to justify any recovery from crude/tariff lows.
tracker.watch_for: HDFC Bank NIM >3.65% (Apr 18). Infosys FY27 guidance (Apr 23) — 2-6% wide range signals uncertainty. Reliance Jio/Retail growth (Apr 15).

tracker.title: Crude Oil Volatility
tracker.india_impact: WTI $104.32 (hit $105.62 intraday). Hormuz functionally closed (IRGC attacks + mines). Bloomberg: $110-120 if closure persists. GRMs -$9.4 — refiners in structural loss. Every Rs 10 crude rise = Rs 8-10/litre OMC subsidy pressure. Aviation ATF confirmed cost shock.
tracker.watch_for: WTI $110 level. OPEC+ emergency supply. US military response to IRGC attacks. India OMC pricing decision.

tracker.title: US Tariff & India Trade Dynamics
tracker.india_impact: 26% reciprocal tariff on Indian goods effective Apr 9. Nifty fell 5.9% on Apr 7 (second-largest single-day fall in a decade). FIIs sold Rs 22,000 cr in one week. Pharma, gems/jewellery, textiles, auto components exposed. IT services largely insulated. Combined with Hormuz blockade = double structural headwind.
tracker.watch_for: US-India tariff negotiation progress. Pharma exemption. FII flow reversal. Rupee past 94 USD/INR.

tracker.title: RBI Monetary Policy Path
tracker.india_impact: Held at 5.25% on Apr 8. March CPI (Apr 13) is immediate trigger — consensus 3.4%, WTI $100 makes hot print more likely. Hot print (>3.6%) kills June cut. Next MPC June 3-5. RBI lowered FY27 growth outlook due to tariff/crude headwinds.
tracker.watch_for: March CPI Apr 13 — 3.4% neutral, >3.6% bearish rate-cut odds. Crude trajectory. June MPC cut probability.

tracker.title: FII Flows & Rupee
tracker.india_impact: FIIs pulled Rs 1.04 lakh cr YTD. Rupee Rs 93.73/USD. 6% Nifty rally suggested tentative FII return but blockade + tariff = double headwind. DIIs counter-buying. Rupee past 94 would accelerate exits.
tracker.watch_for: Wednesday NSE FII/DII data. USD/INR past 94. FOMC Apr 28-29 hawkish surprise. Indo-US trade deal.
